title: cotyledon adscendens
intro: Cotyledon adscendens, also known as the 'string of beads' or 'string of pearls', is a type of succulent plant belonging to the family Crassulaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The health benefits of Cotyledon adscendens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues.
